meta.description: MCP chatbot internal thought flowchart — one tab per pipeline domain.

tabs.label: Main Pipeline
tabs.description: End-to-end pipeline: Question → Comprehension → Routing → Circuit extraction → Fact collection → ReadingPacket → Prose synthesis.

tabs.label: Comprehension
tabs.description: How the chatbot parses a free-text question — LLM structured-output path vs. keyword fallback.

tabs.label: Intent Routing
tabs.description: TermIntent classification — 14 named intents each with a dedicated reading branch.

tabs.label: Topic Maps
tabs.description: Keyword → life-area domain routing across 12 WIZARD_TARGET domains with subtopic refinement.

tabs.label: Switch Points
tabs.description: Detecting incomplete Platonic shapes in the circuit graph and computing the resolution degree + keystone guidance.

tabs.label: Circuit Extraction
tabs.description: Subgraph extraction from the circuit model based on question_type (single_focus, relationship, multi_node, open_exploration).

tabs.label: Prose Synthesis
tabs.description: Voice mode selection, 21-rule system prompt injection, and multi-backend LLM dispatch.

nodes.label: START
nodes.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 stdio request arrives. Dispatcher routes to the relevant MCP tool handler.

nodes.label: User Question (free text)
nodes.description: The 'question' parameter from the ask_chart tool call. Also carries chart_a (and optionally chart_b for dyadic readings).

nodes.label:
Comprehension Layer
comprehend()
nodes.description: Decomposes the question into a QuestionGraph (nodes → astrological factors, edges → relationship types). Two paths: LLM structured-output or keyword fallback.

nodes.label: ClarificationRequest?
nodes.description: If the comprehension layer returned a ClarificationRequest (question too ambiguous), early-exit with a follow-up prompt to the user instead of attempting a full reading.

nodes.label:
Return Clarification
Prompt to User
nodes.description: ReadingPacket returned with comprehension_note = 'CLARIFICATION_NEEDED: <follow_up_question>'. No chart data included.

nodes.label:
Special TermIntent
Branch?
nodes.description: Check whether question_intent maps to a named TermIntent constant (e.g. POTENCY_RANKING, SPIRITUAL_PURPOSE). Named intents take a specialised collection path.

nodes.label:
Special Intent Handler
(e.g. Potency Ranking)
nodes.description: Handles 14 named TermIntents with dedicated collection logic. Example: POTENCY_RANKING scores all planets via dignity_calc and returns tier labels only (no raw numbers).

nodes.label:
Circuit Query
query_circuit()
nodes.description: Extracts the relevant subgraph from the circuit model based on question_type and focus factors. Returns CircuitReading (relevant shapes, narrative seeds, power summary).

nodes.label:
Classical Fact Collection
(placements, aspects, patterns,
dignities, switch points)
nodes.description: Gathers PlacementFacts, AspectFacts, PatternFacts, DignityFacts, and SwitchPointFacts for all factors identified in the QuestionGraph. No LLM involved — pure validated data.

nodes.label: Dyadic + No Chart B?
nodes.description: Soft gate: if subject_config == 'dyadic' but chart_b is None, the chatbot cannot do a full synastry reading. Sets needs_chart_b = True in the ReadingPacket.

nodes.label:
needs_chart_b = True
(partial packet)
nodes.description: Partial ReadingPacket flagged with needs_chart_b = True. Prose synthesizer is instructed to tell the user a second chart is required.

nodes.label:
NatalInterpreter
(optional prose enrichment)
nodes.description: Optional interpretation layer that generates structured interpretation text for natal placements before synthesis. Enriches the ReadingPacket with interp_text.

nodes.label: Assemble ReadingPacket
nodes.description: Collects all facts into a ReadingPacket dataclass. Includes: circuit_reading, placements, aspects, patterns, dignities, switch_points, interp_text, comprehension_result, chart_mode, temporal_dimension.

nodes.label:
Prose Synthesizer
synthesize()
nodes.description: Converts the ReadingPacket into natural language prose. Selects voice mode (circuit vs plain), injects 21-rule system prompt, calls the configured LLM backend, returns SynthesisResult.

nodes.label:
SynthesisResult
(Final Response)
nodes.description: The final SynthesisResult returned to the MCP client. Contains: prose_text, voice_mode, llm_model, reading_packet reference, synthesis_notes.

nodes.label:
Question Text
+ chart_a context
nodes.description: Entry point: comprehend(question, chart_a, api_key). chart_a provides the validated factor vocabulary — LLM cannot reference factors not in VALID_FACTORS from this chart.

nodes.label: API Key Present?
nodes.description: Switches between the LLM structured-output path (full 5W+H) and the keyword fallback path (deterministic pattern matching).

nodes.label:
Phase 1:
Active Listening (5W+H)
nodes.description: LLM extracts full 5W+H (Who/What/When/Where/Why/How) from the question BEFORE touching astrology. Also detects question_form (polar, wh-what, wh-open, why-diagnostic, advisory-how, comparative, ranking, temporal-when, compound).

nodes.label:
Phase 2:
Astrological Mapping
nodes.description: LLM selects astrological factors ONLY from VALID_FACTORS (chart-derived vocabulary). Detects temporal dimension, subject config, relationship types. Cannot hallucinate planet names not in the chart's actual placements.

nodes.label: Parse LLM JSON → schema
nodes.description: Validates LLM output against the ComprehensionResult JSON schema. Falls back to keyword path if the LLM returns malformed JSON.

nodes.label: Question Sufficient?
nodes.description: LLM decides if the question has enough specificity to produce a meaningful reading. Statements with no explicit question set comprehension_confidence = 0.1–0.25 and flag 'no_explicit_question' as ambiguity.

nodes.label:
Build
ClarificationRequest
nodes.description: Returns a ClarificationRequest with a specific follow-up question to the user. The reading engine detects this and returns an early-exit ReadingPacket.

nodes.label:
resolve_factors()
Keyword Match
nodes.description: Matches question text against WIZARD_TARGETS and KEYWORDS_LOOKUP. Returns a TopicMatch with domain, subtopic, factors, confidence, and matched_keywords.

nodes.label: _detect_temporal()
nodes.description: Heuristically classifies temporal frame: natal | transit | synastry | solar_return | relocation | cycle | timing_predict.

nodes.label: _detect_subject()
nodes.description: Classifies subject: single (one person's chart) | dyadic (two people) | familial (parent/child ancestral).

nodes.label: _detect_relationship_type()
nodes.description: Classifies graph edge types: connection | tension | support | timing.

nodes.label:
Question Type
Classifier (node count)
nodes.description: Classifies by number of astrological graph nodes: 0 → open_exploration | 1 → single_focus | 2 → relationship | 3+ → multi_node.

nodes.label:
open_exploration
(0 nodes)
nodes.description: No specific astrological focus detected. Circuit extraction will use top shapes by throughput + SN→NN path + dominant/bottleneck factors.

nodes.label:
single_focus
(1 node)
nodes.description: Single astrological factor (e.g. 'my Moon'). Circuit extraction finds all shapes containing that factor.

nodes.label:
relationship
(2 nodes)
nodes.description: Two astrological factors (e.g. 'Moon and Saturn'). Circuit extraction finds shapes from both clusters plus bridging aspects.

nodes.label:
multi_node
(3+ nodes)
nodes.description: Three or more factors. Circuit extraction unions all shapes containing any factor from any node.

nodes.label:
QuestionGraph
(nodes + edges + metadata)
nodes.description: Final output: a QuestionGraph with factor nodes, relationship edges, question_type, question_form, temporal_dimension, subject_config, comprehension_confidence, and ambiguities list.

nodes.label:
QuestionGraph
(question_intent field)
nodes.description: The question_intent field from ComprehensionResult maps to one of 14 TermIntent constants or falls through to the generic pipeline.

nodes.label: Named TermIntent?
nodes.description: Checks if question_intent matches a known TermIntent constant. If yes, routes to a specialised handler. If no, continues through the generic pipeline.

nodes.label:
Generic Pipeline
(standard path)
nodes.description: No special intent detected. Falls through to the standard circuit-query + fact-collection + synthesis pipeline.

nodes.label:
POTENCY_RANKING
→ Score all planets
nodes.description: Scores all 10 planets using dignity_calc power index. Returns tier labels (Dominant / Strong / Moderate / Weak) — never raw numeric scores. Bypasses normal circuit extraction.

nodes.label:
RELATIONSHIP_READING
→ Synastry branch
nodes.description: Partner/synastry reading. Requires chart_b. Extracts inter-chart aspects and combined circuit patterns.

nodes.label:
TIMING_FORECAST
→ Transit timing
nodes.description: Future transit window analysis. Identifies when transiting planets contact natal switch points or key natal factors. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
CAREER_PATH
→ MC/Saturn guidance
nodes.description: Career and public life reading. Focuses on MC, Saturn, 10th house, Capricorn. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
CYCLE_GUIDANCE
→ Saturn/Jupiter cycle
nodes.description: Long-period planetary cycles (Saturn return, Jupiter cycle, Pluto transits). NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
SPIRITUAL_PURPOSE
→ North Node / soul path
nodes.description: Soul purpose and spiritual direction. Focuses on North Node, South Node, 12th house, Neptune. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
EMOTIONAL_WELLNESS
→ Moon / inner world
nodes.description: Emotional patterns, anxiety, grief, inner landscape. Focuses on Moon, Ceres, 4th house, Cancer. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
CHALLENGE_TRANSMUTE
→ Difficult aspects → strengths
nodes.description: Reframes challenging aspects (squares, oppositions, difficult placements) as latent strengths and growth edges. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
LIFE_AREA_PRIORITY
→ What to focus on
nodes.description: Identifies the most activated or stressed life area. Combines current transits with natal chart weight. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
FAMILY_DYNAMICS
→ Parental / ancestral
nodes.description: Parental and ancestral pattern reading. Focuses on 4th house, Moon, Saturn, IC, Chiron. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
RELOCATION
→ Astrocartography
nodes.description: Relocation chart considerations — how a different geographic location shifts house cusps and chart emphasis. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
COMMUNITY_BELONGING
→ 11th house / groups
nodes.description: Finding community and belonging. Focuses on 11th house, Uranus, Aquarius. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
FINANCIAL_INSIGHT
→ 2nd/8th house money
nodes.description: Financial patterns and resources. Focuses on 2nd/8th house axis, Venus, Jupiter, Taurus/Scorpio. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label:
TRAIT_PERCEPTION
→ How others see you
nodes.description: External perception and reputation. Focuses on Ascendant, 1st house, Sun, Mars. NOT YET BUILT.

nodes.label: Question Text
nodes.description: Raw question text passed to resolve_factors(). Can also be called with a domain hint from a prior LLM comprehension step.

nodes.label:
resolve_factors()
Keyword token scan
nodes.description: Tokenises the question and matches against WIZARD_TARGETS keyword arrays. Returns the highest-confidence TopicMatch, or General (confidence 0.15) as fallback.

nodes.label: Keyword matched?
nodes.description: If a domain keyword match is found above the confidence threshold, route to that domain. Otherwise route to General fallback.

nodes.label:
General (fallback)
confidence 0.15
nodes.description: Fallback domain with confidence 0.15. Used when no specific domain keyword matches. Includes broad factors covering all chart areas.

nodes.label:
Identity & Self
(Sun, ASC, NN, 1st)
nodes.description: Domain 1: Identity. Sun, Ascendant, North Node, 1st House. Keywords: identity, self, who am I, personality, appearance.

nodes.label:
Emotions & Inner World
(Moon, Ceres, 4th)
nodes.description: Domain 2: Emotions. Moon, Ceres, 4th House, Cancer. Keywords: feelings, emotions, anxiety, grief, inner world, nurturing.

nodes.label:
Relationships & Love
(Venus, Mars, 7th)
nodes.description: Domain 3: Relationships. Venus, Mars, 7th House, Descendant. Keywords: love, relationship, partner, attraction, marriage.

nodes.label:
Career & Public Life
(MC, Saturn, 10th)
nodes.description: Domain 4: Career. MC, Saturn, 10th House, Capricorn. Keywords: career, work, job, profession, ambition, authority.

nodes.label:
Finances & Resources
(Venus, Jupiter, 2nd)
nodes.description: Domain 5: Finance. Venus, Jupiter, 2nd House, Taurus. Keywords: money, finances, resources, wealth, abundance.

nodes.label:
Learning & Mind
(Mercury, Jupiter, 3rd/9th)
nodes.description: Domain 6: Mind. Mercury, Jupiter, 3rd/9th House. Keywords: learning, mind, communication, education, travel, beliefs.

nodes.label:
Spirituality & Imagination
(Neptune, 12th, Pisces)
nodes.description: Domain 7: Spirituality. Neptune, 12th House, Pisces. Keywords: spirituality, dreams, intuition, mysticism, transcendence.

nodes.label:
Change & Transformation
(Pluto, 8th, Scorpio)
nodes.description: Domain 8: Transformation. Pluto, 8th House, Scorpio. Keywords: change, transformation, death, rebirth, power, loss.

nodes.label:
Conflict & Enemies
(Mars, Eris, 7th shadow)
nodes.description: Domain 9: Conflict. Mars, Eris, 7th House shadow side. Keywords: conflict, enemies, arguments, competition, aggression.

nodes.label:
Devotion & Service
(Vesta, Chiron, 6th)
nodes.description: Domain 10: Service. Vesta, Chiron, 6th House. Keywords: service, devotion, health, daily routines, healing, purpose.

nodes.label:
Community & Future
(Uranus, 11th, Aquarius)
nodes.description: Domain 11: Community. Uranus, 11th House, Aquarius. Keywords: community, friends, groups, future, innovation, belonging.

nodes.label:
TopicMatch
(domain + subtopic +
factors + confidence)
nodes.description: Final output: TopicMatch dataclass with domain, subtopic, factors (list of astrological factor IDs), confidence (0.0–1.0), and matched_keywords.

nodes.label:
Natal Chart
(aspect graph)
nodes.description: Entry: find_switch_points(chart). Receives the parsed natal chart with all detected aspect patterns.

nodes.label:
Scan for Incomplete
Resonant Shapes
nodes.description: Iterates all detected aspect patterns and checks SHAPE_COMPLETIONS map to find T-Squares, Wedges, Envelopes, and Cradles — each of which has a missing completion point.

nodes.label: Which incomplete shape?
nodes.description: Dispatches to the appropriate geometry function based on the detected shape type. Each shape has a unique geometric method for locating the missing degree.

nodes.label:
T-Square
→ _find_t_square_apex()
Switch = 180° from apex
nodes.description: Locates the T-Square apex planet. Switch point = 180° from the apex (completing it into a Grand Cross). Completes to: Grand Cross (drum_head membrane).

nodes.label:
Wedge
→ _find_wedge_non_opp()
Switch = 180° from non-opp
nodes.description: Finds the planet in the Wedge that does NOT form an opposition. Switch point = 180° from that planet (completing it into a Mystic Rectangle / resonant_membrane).

nodes.label:
Envelope
→ _find_envelope_missing()
Switch = 180° from endpoint
nodes.description: Analyses sextile chain endpoints. Switch point = 180° from the endpoint that lacks an opposition (completing it into a Merkabah / drum_head).

nodes.label:
Cradle
→ _find_cradle_extension()
Adds 5th sextile link
nodes.description: Extends the 4-planet sextile chain by one more step. The switch point is the sextile extension point (completing the Cradle into an Envelope, stepping toward Merkabah).

nodes.label:
Compute Switch Point
(longitude → sign/degree/DMS)
nodes.description: Converts the raw ecliptic longitude to: sign name, degree_in_sign, DMS string, and range_description (orb-spread capture range for activation window).

nodes.label:
Sabian Symbol
at switch-point degree
nodes.description: Looks up the Sabian symbol from sabian_symbols.json at the exact switch-point degree. Adds symbolic/archetypal interpretive depth to the structural calculation.

nodes.label:
Saturn Element Context
_build_saturn_summary()
nodes.description: Checks the element of natal Saturn's sign to determine which type of keystone (real-world structure) will most effectively activate the switch point.

nodes.label: Saturn Element?
nodes.description: Routes to element-specific keystone guidance based on Saturn's element in the natal chart.

nodes.label:
Fire Saturn
→ active, performative,
identity-affirming keystones
nodes.description: Fire Saturn (Aries, Leo, Sagittarius): keystones should be active, visible, performance-based, or identity-affirming — theatre, leadership roles, athletic structures.

nodes.label:
Earth Saturn
→ material, sensory,
daily practice keystones
nodes.description: Earth Saturn (Taurus, Virgo, Capricorn): keystones should be material, physical, sensory, or habitual — gardens, craft disciplines, structured daily routines.

nodes.label:
Air Saturn
→ learning, community,
dialogue keystones
nodes.description: Air Saturn (Gemini, Libra, Aquarius): keystones should involve learning, systematic thinking, community structures, or dialogue — book clubs, regular study, group commitments.

nodes.label:
Water Saturn
→ reflection, creative
space, emotional keystones
nodes.description: Water Saturn (Cancer, Scorpio, Pisces): keystones should support emotional processing, creative expression, or sacred solo practice — journaling, therapy structure, regular ceremony.

nodes.label:
switch_point_house
(natal house lookup)
nodes.description: Determines which natal house the switch point degree falls in. This contextualises the life area where the activation would most naturally manifest.

nodes.label:
SwitchPointFact
(per shape)
nodes.description: Final output: SwitchPointFact dataclass with longitude, sign, degree_in_sign, dms, range_description, sabian_symbol, saturn_context (keystone guidance), switch_point_house, source_shape, completes_to.

nodes.label:
QuestionGraph
+ Circuit Model
nodes.description: Entry: query_circuit(question_graph, circuit_model). question_graph provides focus factors; circuit_model is the full planetary aspect graph with throughput/bottleneck weights.

nodes.label: question_type?
nodes.description: Routes to one of four extraction strategies based on the question_type from ComprehensionResult.

nodes.label:
single_focus
→ All shapes containing
the focus factor
nodes.description: Extracts all aspect shapes that contain any focus factor. Returns full shapes — not trimmed — to preserve the complete circuit structure.

nodes.label:
relationship
→ Shapes from both clusters
+ bridging aspects
nodes.description: For two-factor questions: finds shapes containing factors from either cluster, plus any direct aspects or shared-shape memberships that bridge the two clusters.

nodes.label:
multi_node
→ Union of all shapes
for any factor
nodes.description: For 3+ factor questions: takes the union of all shapes containing any factor from any QuestionGraph node. May produce a large subgraph — deduplication applied.

nodes.label:
open_exploration
→ Top shapes by throughput
+ SN→NN path + dominant
nodes.description: For unfocused questions: selects top N shapes by circuit throughput weight, adds the South Node→North Node path, and identifies the chart's dominant factor and bottleneck.

nodes.label:
CircuitReading
(relevant_shapes,
narrative_seeds,
power_summary)
nodes.description: Final output: CircuitReading with relevant_shapes (deduplicated), focus_nodes, narrative_seeds (starting points for prose), power_summary, sn_nn_relevance.

nodes.label: ReadingPacket
nodes.description: Full ReadingPacket: circuit_reading, placements, aspects, patterns, dignities, switch_points, interp_text, comprehension_result, chart_mode, temporal_dimension.

nodes.label:
Select Voice Mode
(circuit vs plain)
nodes.description: 'circuit' voice: energy/flow/friction metaphor language ('power flows through the trine', 'friction load on the square'). 'plain' voice: psychological/life language ('natural talent', 'area of tension').

nodes.label:
Inject 21-Rule
System Prompt
nodes.description: Builds the full system prompt from 21 hard rules covering: data fidelity, hallucination prevention, power index display, querent state adaptation, biwheel context reading, circuit shape deduplication, and more.

nodes.label: LLM Backend?
nodes.description: Checks which LLM backend is configured. Dispatches to the appropriate API client or the structured-text fallback renderer.

nodes.label:
OpenRouter
(Gemini 2.0 Flash, default)
nodes.description: Default backend: google/gemini-2.0-flash-001 via OpenRouter API. Fast and cost-effective for structured astrological prose.

nodes.label:
OpenAI
(GPT-4o, configurable)
nodes.description: OpenAI backend for GPT-4o or other OpenAI models. Configured via OPENAI_API_KEY.

nodes.label:
Anthropic
(Claude, configurable)
nodes.description: Anthropic backend for Claude models. Configured via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

nodes.label:
Structured-Text
Fallback (no LLM)
nodes.description: When no API key is available: renders structured text directly from the ReadingPacket fields without LLM. Produces a deterministic but readable outline of chart facts.

nodes.label:
SynthesisResult
(prose_text + metadata)
nodes.description: Final output: SynthesisResult with prose_text, voice_mode, llm_model used, synthesis_notes (any rule violations detected), and raw ReadingPacket reference.
